relations.note: Prohibiting adjacent dark sections depends on the background colors declared in the section metadata.

quotes: Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section**
Modular Assembly Conventions **[GENERAL — Solstice production rules]**
Each section is a self-contained `<table>`-based block at 600px with its own top/bottom 32px padding and declared background color; **no margins outside the section** — assembly is direct stacking.

rules.intent: Maintain email standard width, direct stacking, and vertical breathing room across sections.
rules.rule_text: Each section is a self-contained table-based block matching Email Width (dimension.canvas.width = 600px) with its own top/bottom 32px padding (padding.section.vertical = 32px), with no external margins. Assembly is direct stacking.

quotes: Section metadata must declare: background color, whether the section establishes `dermatomyositis (DM)`, footnote symbols consumed (†, ‡ assigned at assembly to avoid collisions), and whether it contains a CTA.

rules.intent: Ensure metadata properties are present on sections to guide the assembler logic.
rules.rule_text: Section metadata must declare: background color, whether the section establishes dermatomyositis (DM), footnote symbols consumed, and whether it contains a CTA.

quotes: Footnote symbols: superscript, assigned in order of appearance at **assembly time** — sections use placeholder tokens (e.g., `{{fn1}}`) rather than hard-coded daggers when more than one referenced claim exists.

rules.intent: Prevent duplicate or conflicting footnote assignment across independent assembled blocks.
rules.rule_text: Footnote symbols must be superscript and assigned in order of appearance at assembly time. Sections must use placeholder tokens (e.g. {{fn1}}) rather than hard-coded daggers when multiple referenced claims exist to prevent collision.

quotes: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team; sections adjacent to them must not include decorative elements that visually depend on what's above/below (e.g., a wave that's meant to continue into the footer).

rules.intent: Maintain visual integrity and structural modularity around locked system components.
rules.rule_text: Locked components (header, footer, ISI) are inserted by the core team. Sections adjacent to these locked blocks must not include decorative visual elements that depend on continuation above or below.

quotes: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections
Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark sections (assembler responsibility, enabled by declared backgrounds).

rules.intent: Ensure visual rhythm and high contrast variations across the stacked sections of the email.
rules.rule_text: Dark-background sections must not be placed adjacent to other dark-background sections during assembly.

quotes: All colors in code as HEX; all sizing in px; inline CSS only (email client compatibility); `bgcolor` attributes duplicated for Outlook.

rules.intent: Preserve rendering fidelity in restrictive email clients, particularly Outlook.
rules.rule_text: All colors in code must be HEX; all sizing in px; inline CSS only to ensure email client compatibility; and `bgcolor` attributes must be duplicated on structural tables/cells for Outlook rendering.
